glosses.zh-Hans: 朝那边（前缀）; 远离说话者
glosses.yue: 向嗰邊（前綴）; 遠離講者
glosses.ru: в ту сторону (приставка); прочь от говорящего
glosses.vi: về phía đó (tiền tố); rời xa người nói
glosses.nl: naar daar (voorvoegsel); weg van de spreker
glosses.uk: у той бік (префікс); віддалення від мовця
glosses.hi: उधर की ओर (उपसर्ग); वक्ता से दूर जाना
glosses.pl: w tamtą stronę (prefiks); oddalanie się od mówiącego
glosses.el: προς τα εκεί (πρόθημα); μακριά από τον ομιλητή
glosses.nb: dit (prefiks); bort fra den som snakker
glosses.ja: そちらへ（接頭辞）; 話し手から離れる

translations.hi: मुझे समझ नहीं आ रहा कि क्या चुनूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg klarer ikke å bestemme meg.

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; subject of the copular clause.
Copular auxiliary 'sein', 1st person singular, present; links the subject to the predicative complement.
Directional particle; part of the fixed pair 'hin und her' indicating back-and-forth movement.
Coordinating conjunction linking the directional particles 'hin' and 'her'.
Past participle used adjectivally (from separable verb with 'her-' + 'reißen'); predicative complement in the expression 'hin und hergerissen'.

sentences.target: Wir müssen den Tisch hin- und herschieben.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈmʏsn̩ deːn tɪʃ hɪn ʊnt heːɐ̯ˈʃiːbn̩/

translations.de: Wir müssen den Tisch hin- und herschieben.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈmʏsn̩ deːn tɪʃ hɪn ʊnt heːɐ̯ˈʃiːbn̩/
translations.en: We have to push the table back and forth.
translations.es: Tenemos que mover la mesa de un lado a otro.
translations.fr: On doit déplacer la table d'un côté à l'autre.
translations.it: Dobbiamo spostare il tavolo avanti e indietro.
translations.yue: 我哋要將張枱推嚟推去。
translations.pt: Precisamos empurrar a mesa de um lado para o outro.
translations.he: אנחנו צריכים להזיז את השולחן הלוך ושוב.
translations.vi: Chúng ta phải đẩy cái bàn qua lại.
translations.nl: We moeten de tafel heen en weer schuiven.
translations.hi: हमें मेज़ को आगे-पीछे धकेलना होगा.
translations.pl: Musimy przesuwać stół tam i z powrotem.
translations.el: Πρέπει να σπρώξουμε το τραπέζι πέρα δώθε.
translations.nb: Vi må skyve bordet frem og tilbake.
translations.sv: Vi måste skjuta bordet fram och tillbaka.
translations.ro: Trebuie să împingem masa înainte și înapoi.
translations.cs: Musíme posouvat stůl sem a tam.
translations.da: Vi skal skubbe bordet frem og tilbage.
translations.ja: テーブルを前後に動かさないといけない。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural, nominative; subject.
Modal auxiliary, present, 1st person plural; selects an infinitive complement.
Definite article, accusative masculine singular; marks the direct object.
Common noun, masculine; direct object in accusative singular.
Directional particle; first part of the pair 'hin und her' indicating repeated back-and-forth motion.
Coordinating conjunction linking 'hin' and the verb with 'her-'.
Infinitive of a separable verb with prefix 'her-'; complement of 'müssen'. Together with 'hin und' expresses pushing back and forth.

sentences.target: Er muss die Kisten hin- und hertragen.
sentences.reading: /eːɐ̯ mʊs diː ˈkɪstn̩ hɪn ʊnt heːɐ̯ˈtʁaːɡn̩/

translations.de: Er muss die Kisten hin- und hertragen.
translations.ipa: /eːɐ̯ mʊs diː ˈkɪstn̩ hɪn ʊnt heːɐ̯ˈtʁaːɡn̩/
translations.en: He has to carry the boxes back and forth.
translations.es: Tiene que llevar las cajas de un lado a otro.
translations.fr: Il doit porter les cartons d'un côté à l'autre.
translations.it: Deve portare le scatole avanti e indietro.
translations.pt: Ele tem que carregar as caixas pra lá e pra cá.
translations.he: הוא צריך לסחוב את הארגזים הלוך ושוב.
translations.vi: Anh ấy phải khiêng những cái thùng qua lại.
translations.ar: عليه أن يحمل الصناديق ذهابا وإيابا.
translations.nl: Hij moet de dozen heen en weer dragen.
translations.hi: उसे बक्से आगे-पीछे उठाकर ले जाना होगा.
translations.pl: Musi nosić pudełka tam i z powrotem.
translations.el: Πρέπει να κουβαλάει τα κιβώτια πέρα δώθε.
translations.nb: Han må bære kassene frem og tilbake.
translations.sv: Han måste bära lådorna fram och tillbaka.
translations.ro: Trebuie să care cutiile înainte și înapoi.
translations.cs: Musí přenášet krabice sem a tam.
translations.da: Han skal बære kasserne frem og tilbage.
translations.ja: 彼は箱を往復して運ばなければならない。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular, nominative; subject.
Modal auxiliary, present, 3rd person singular; selects an infinitive complement.
Definite article, accusative plural; marks the direct object.
Common noun, plural; direct object in accusative plural.
Directional particle; first part of the pair 'hin und her', indicating back-and-forth movement.
Coordinating conjunction linking the directional particle and the verb with 'her-'.
Infinitive of a separable verb with prefix 'her-'; complement of 'muss'. With 'hin und' conveys carrying back and forth.

sentences.target: Sie muss die Termine hin- und herschieben.
sentences.reading: /ziː mʊs diː tɛʁˈmiːnə hɪn ʊnt heːɐ̯ˈʃiːbn̩/

translations.de: Sie muss die Termine hin- und herschieben.
translations.ipa: /ziː mʊs diː tɛʁˈmiːnə hɪn ʊnt heːɐ̯ˈʃiːbn̩/
translations.en: She has to move the appointments around.
translations.yue: 佢要將啲約會改嚟改去。
translations.vi: Cô ấy phải sắp xếp lại các lịch hẹn.
translations.hi: उसे अपॉइंटमेंट्स को फिर से तय करना है.
translations.id: Dia harus mengatur ulang janji temu.
translations.da: Hun skal flytte rundt på aftalerne.
translations.ja: 予定を調整しなきゃいけない。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular, nominative; subject.
Modal auxiliary, present, 3rd person singular; selects an infinitive complement.
Definite article, accusative plural; marks the direct object.
Common noun, plural; direct object in accusative plural.
Directional particle; part of 'hin und her' indicating repeated back-and-forth action.
Coordinating conjunction linking 'hin' and the verb with 'her-'.
Infinitive of a separable verb with prefix 'her-'; complement of 'muss'. With 'hin und' indicates repeatedly shifting back and forth.
